summary: Completed dark mode implementation testing for Khmer Dubbing app. All dark mode features verified working correctly on Landing page. Theme toggle, localStorage persistence, and visual styling all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Landing page renders properly in light mode (white background)
Theme toggle button (sun/moon icon) is visible and clickable on landing page
Clicking theme toggle switches between dark and light mode
Dark mode landing page has dark background (bg-zinc-950) with white text
Light mode landing page has white background (bg-white) with dark text
Google login button (Sign In) shows correct styling in both modes
Get Started button shows correct styling in both modes
Feature cards section (Auto Language Detect, Custom Voice, Share & Export) visible in both modes
Theme toggle icon changes correctly (Moon in light mode, Sun in dark mode)
SharedProject page has ThemeToggle component in header (code verified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode fully implemented and tested. ThemeToggle component uses Sun/Moon phosphor icons. Theme state managed via AuthContext (isDark, toggleTheme). tc() helper function at line 22 returns dark or light class based on isDark state. Theme persists in localStorage under 'theme' key. Dark class toggled on document.documentElement. All pages (Landing, Dashboard, Editor, SharedProject) use isDark from useAuth() hook. Dashboard and Editor pages require authentication to test - focus was on Landing page which is publicly accessible.

features_verified.theme_toggle_button: ThemeToggle component with data-testid='theme-toggle' renders Sun icon in dark mode, Moon icon in light mode
features_verified.light_mode_styling: Landing page uses bg-white background, dark text (text-zinc-950), zinc-100 feature card backgrounds
features_verified.dark_mode_styling: Landing page uses bg-zinc-950 background, white text (text-white), zinc-900 feature card backgrounds
features_verified.localStorage_persistence: Theme saved to localStorage under 'theme' key ('dark' or 'light')
features_verified.page_reload_persistence: Theme persists correctly after page reload
features_verified.tailwind_dark_mode: darkMode: ['class'] configured in tailwind.config.js, 'dark' class toggled on document.documentElement

notes: Dashboard, Editor, and SharedProject pages also have dark mode support (verified via code review) but require authentication to fully test UI. SharedProject page has ThemeToggle in header at line 1518. All components use the tc(isDark, lightClass, darkClass) helper or direct conditional classes.
